title: hieracium schmidtii subsp. giresunense
intro: Hieracium schmidtii subsp. giresunense is a subspecies of the Hieracium genus, commonly known as hawkweed, which is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium schmidtii subsp. giresunense include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used externally or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
